name: AMAZON COM INC
summary: Amazon.com, Inc. is a global technology and e-commerce company organized into three segments: North America, International, and Amazon Web Services (AWS). It operates online and physical retail stores, offers third-party seller services, and provides cloud computing services including compute, storage, database, analytics, and AI/ML through AWS. It also manufactures devices (Kindle, Fire TV, Echo, Ring), offers Amazon Prime subscriptions, produces media content, and provides advertising services.
